content:
I translated some of the things related to gameplay in the official announcement.
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1131796304050262126/1169591817067565157
Chaos Realm Talents
※ When all awakened entities in the team belong to the Chaos Realm, at the end of each turn and after each release of EX, they will each gain a certain amount of Key energy!
(Key Energy can be used to activate powerful Key skills)
※ Chaos Realm awakened entities can form teams without restrictions with awakened entities from other realms, making team formations more flexible and versatile!
※ As long as there is at least one Chaos Realm awakened entity in the team, the team will gain additional chances of death resistance!

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1131796304050262126/1170651396148822036
Deep Sea Realm Talents
At the start of the battle, summon 1 tentacle. The tentacle attacks the front enemies at the end of each turn.
※ Whenever an enemy dies, the tentacle's damage permanently increases.
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1131796304050262126/1171784751191957576

Flesh Realm Talents
※ At the beginning of the turn, gain a certain amount of 「◤◢◥◣」 fusion progress. When it reaches 100%, add 1 「◤◢◥◣」 card to your hand.
※ Playing 「◤◢◥◣」 allows you to choose awakened entities to increase energy. The EX of the Flesh Realm will consume 「◤◢◥◣」to trigger the Devour effect.
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1131796304050262126/1172135593984143370

Transcendent Realm Talents
※ The temporary copy of the first skill card played each turn enters the Transcendent Dimension.
※ When the Transcendent Dimension reaches its limit, gain an additional Transcendent turn and retain the shield.
(Basically, each turn, the first card played is stored, and when a specific quantity is reached, an additional turn is gained to play those stored cards.)
<@633215996508766229> I'm looking forward to finding out what's new about the events within the game 🥳😍
It would take away the fun if we disclose things too early～
<@633215996508766229> Yes yes, I prefer to wait
what is talents? is it something like weapon in Genshin?

I haven't played Genshin Impact, so I'm not very familiar with that part.

Each awakened entity has its own realm. If every awakened entity in the team belongs to the same realm, it can trigger realm talents.
"Awakened entity"(喚醒體) is the name of playable character in this game.
can we change the realm of our character?

No, the realm of each Awakened entity is fixed.
(At least, from what I've seen, it's not possible.)
It appears to be like Faction bonuses if I'm reading correctly
So characters belonging to the same "faction" or whatnot will get bonuses when on the same team
